responsibilities: Analyze user behavior data to identify opportunities for improving product engagement and retention
Design and analyze A/B tests to measure the impact of new features on key product metrics
Build funnel and cohort analyses to uncover drop-off points and opportunities across the user journey
Partner with product managers to define success metrics and instrumentation requirements for new features
Develop self-service dashboards that allow product teams to monitor key performance indicators independently
Conduct deep-dive analyses into user segments to inform targeted product and growth strategies
Translate complex data findings into clear, actionable recommendations for product roadmap prioritization
Collaborate with data engineering teams to ensure accurate, reliable event tracking and data instrumentation
Monitor product health metrics and proactively flag anomalies or significant shifts in user behavior
Present analytical insights and experiment results to product and leadership teams to guide decision-making
